items.event_title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Group Stage Matches
items.text_on_image:
FIFA World Cup 2026
Group Stage Matches
June 22
items.image_prompt: emotional cinematic social media poster, vertical 9:16, modern warm atmosphere, central smartphone showing a glowing soccer ball, subtle glowing music notes floating around, subtle sound waves, symbolic soccer field background with abstract players, personal greeting and gift mood, clean composition
items.reels_text: Kick off the excitement! FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage matches start June 22. Feel the passion and rhythm of the game!
